---
applyTo: "TASKS.md"
---

# Task File Instructions

This is a Ralph Wiggum Loop task file. When editing this file:

1. **Status markers** use this format:
   - `[ ]` — pending (not started)
   - `[~]` — in progress (currently being worked on)
   - `[x]` — done (completed successfully)
   - `[!]` — failed (attempted but unsuccessful — include error details)
   - `[STOP]` — emergency stop (halts the loop immediately)

2. **One status change per iteration** — only update the task you just worked on

3. **Add error details to failed tasks** — include the error message so the next iteration can see it

4. **Preserve task order** — do not reorder tasks as dependencies may exist

5. **Mark dependencies explicitly** — use "Depends on: Task N" format
